Madea’s Big Happy Family (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $53,345,287Details
International Box Office $815,531
Worldwide Box Office $54,160,818
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $12,436,345
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,220,848
Total $13,657,193
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Madea, everyone's favorite wise-cracking, take-no-prisoners grandma, jumps into action when her niece, Shirley, receives distressing news about her health. All Shirley wants is to gather her three adult children around her and share the news as a family. But Tammy, Kimberly and Byron are too distracted by their own problems: Tammy can't manage her unruly children or her broken marriage; Kimberly is gripped with anger and takes it out on her husband; and Byron, after spending two years in jail, is under pressure to deal drugs again. It's up to Madea, with the help of the equally rambunctious Aunt Bam, to gather the clan together and make things right the only way she knows how: with a lot of tough love, laughter...and the revelation of a long-buried family secret.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$25,068,677 (47.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.13 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:98.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,288 opening theaters/2,288 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $80,455,183

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 22nd, 2011 (Wide) by Lionsgate, released as Madea's Big Happy Family
Video Release: August 30th, 2011 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for drug content, language and some mature thematic material.
(Rating bulletin 2162, 3/9/2011)
Running Time: 106 minutes
Franchise: Madea Cinematic Universe
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Fat Suit
Plot point: African Americans, Cross-Dressing, Dysfunctional Family, Funeral Reunions, Terminal Illness
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Based on Play
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Tyler Perry Studios, Lionsgate, Reuben Cannon Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Madea, everyone's favorite wise-cracking, take-no-prisoners grandma, jumps into action when her niece, Shirley, receives distressing news about her health. All Shirley wants is to gather her three adult children around her and share the news as a family. But Tammy, Kimberly and Byron are too distracted by their own problems: Tammy can't manage her unruly children or her broken marriage; Kimberly is gripped with anger and takes it out on her husband; and Byron, after spending two years in jail, is under pressure to deal drugs again. It's up to Madea, with the help of the equally rambunctious Aunt Bam, to gather the clan together and make things right the only way she knows how: with a lot of tough love, laughter...and the revelation of a long-buried family secret.
